compiled_state.title: Add RED/GREEN/UPDATE testing model, scaffolding markers, and shared standard to fix-bug SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Update fix-bug SKILL.md to integrate the RED/GREEN/UPDATE testing model with GREEN/UPDATE as defaults and RED only for coverage gaps.

### Gate 2 Justification (bundled change)
The testing_mode classification gate, Step 5 branching logic, scaffolding test markers, and shared standard consumption must be committed together because: classification without Step 5 branching is inert (Gate 1), branching without classification produces undefined behavior (Gate 1), and scaffolding markers without testing model context are meaningless.

### Steps
1. Add testing_mode classification gate between Step 4.5 and Step 5:
   - Examine investigation RESULT root cause and fix scope
   - GREEN: fix changes implementation without changing observable behavior (e.g., performance optimization, refactor, internal restructuring)
   - UPDATE: fix changes behavior AND existing tests cover the affected paths (existing tests need updating to assert new behavior)
   - RED: fix changes behavior AND no existing tests cover the affected paths (coverage gap requires new failing test)
   - Default: GREEN (most bug fixes change implementation, not behavior)
2. Branch Step 5 based on testing_mode:
   - GREEN: Skip RED test writing entirely. Log "Testing mode: GREEN — existing tests validate fix correctness. Proceeding to implementation."
   - UPDATE: Modify existing tests to assert new expected behavior before implementing fix
   - RED: Dispatch red-test-writer as current behavior
3. Add scaffolding test support to Step 3 (hypothesis testing):
   - Hypothesis validation tests from Step 3 may be kept temporarily as scaffolding
   - Mark with `## Scaffolding Test — remove after fix validation` section
   - Do NOT register scaffolding tests in .test-index with RED markers (they are temporary, not part of the TDD contract)
   - Add explicit removal instructions in Step 7 (fix verification)
4. Add shared behavioral testing standard consumption:
   - Reference `plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md` at Step 5
   - Note: file created by sibling story 4095-e3d9; reference as future consumption point if not yet present
5. Remove .test-index RED marker from the eval task

### File Impact
- `plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md` — Edit (Steps 4.5→5 gate, Step 5 branching, Step 3 scaffolding, Step 7 cleanup)
- `.test-index` — Edit (remove RED marker)

## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Eval passes after SKILL.md modification (PRIMARY behavioral criterion)
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains testing_mode classification gate
  Verify: grep -q "testing_mode" plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains GREEN/UPDATE/RED branching at Step 5
  Verify: grep -q "GREEN.*skip.*RED\|Testing mode: GREEN" plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains scaffolding test instructions
  Verify: grep -q "Scaffolding" plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references shared behavioral testing standard
  Verify: grep -q "behavioral-testing-standard" plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep -q "\[fix_bug_testing_mode" .test-index; test $? -ne 0; }
